market_conditions.gap_data_discrepancy: Bot estimated -6.18% (2pt EMA, wrong) vs real 2.9% (FMP). Bot saw UP gap; filter logic may have been inverted.

bot_behavior.note: All 4 models used 2pt EMA estimate (pre-FMP), inflated confidence to 100, missed bearish gap

lessons.gap_filter: Real gap was +2.88% (up). Bot estimated -6.18% (down) from 2pt EMA — wrong direction entirely. FMP data MUST be loaded before confidence scoring. Gap filter: if |gap| > 1.5%, require SQQQ confirmation or skip longs.
lessons.confidence_accuracy: 100/100 confidence was wrong — all 4 trades lost. 2pt EMA should cap confidence at 65 max. RSI unavailable (null) further degraded signal quality.
lessons.rsi_accuracy: RSI was null for all models — no predictive signal. RSI must be required (not optional) before entry in future.
lessons.stop_behavior: Scalp models stopped out at -3.54% vs -0.5% target — 23-min monitoring gap caused 7x stop slippage. Scalp monitoring must run every 5min or stops need to be real limit orders.
lessons.diversification: All 4 models took identical TQQQ BUY = 4x concentration in one direction. Challenger models must have different entry criteria to provide actual diversification.

priority_fixes: CRITICAL: Load FMP bars FIRST in Routine 1 before confidence scoring — never use 2pt EMA for gap calculation
CRITICAL: Implement gap filter — if real_gap > +1.5% AND intraday_trend bearish at scan, bias to SQQQ or skip
HIGH: Cap 2pt EMA-derived confidence at 65 max; require RSI as non-null before any entry; add challenger diversification constraints

bot_behavior.gap_filter_note: gap -2.75% ≤ -2.5% threshold → TQQQ longs blocked entirely; SQQQ confidence thresholds not reached by R3/R4

root_causes: Gap of -2.75% correctly triggered TQQQ-long block (gap filter working as designed)
SQQQ was theoretically allowed but momentum/confidence thresholds not met at R3 (10:15) or R4 (11:00) windows
TQQQ fell -5.77% intraday from prev close — a SQQQ entry would have been highly profitable had confidence threshold been met

lessons.gap_filter: Gap filter fired correctly on -2.75% gap. Blocked TQQQ longs as designed. However, SQQQ entries were also missed — this is the right trade-off (avoid false signals on gap reversals) but worth noting that SQQQ was the winning direction today.
lessons.confidence_accuracy: N/A — no entries taken. Gap filter precluded TQQQ entries. SQQQ confidence thresholds (75-82) not reached in R3/R4 windows.
lessons.diversification: N/A — all 4 models skipped. No correlation data for today.

priority_fixes: SQQQ confidence thresholds (75-82 min) may be too restrictive on confirmed gap-down days — consider separate lower threshold when gap ≤ -2.5% and momentum confirms continuation
Bar-replay verification shows no monitoring gap issues today (no trades placed)
Day 2 of v2 models: 0 signals logged — need to track signal attempts (even rejected ones) to tune thresholds vs actual market conditions

bot_behavior.skip_reason: all_models_vix_gated — vix_proxy (34.4-37.9) exceeded threshold of 22 all day

missed_gain_estimate: +9.59% on TQQQ — high-conviction TQQQ_BUY day; all models correctly oriented for bullish gap but blocked by vix_proxy gate
root_causes: vix_proxy (34.4-37.9) far exceeds gate threshold of 22 — entire day blocked
Bullish +2.28% gap and +9.59% TQQQ close confirm strong trend day we missed
Bug flagged by R5: scalp models missing 1230/1400 windows in signal_engine.py — champion/challenger correctly logged SKIP_WINDOW at 1400 but also shouldn't be; needs investigation

lessons.gap_filter: Gap +2.28% is a bullish signal — gap filter would NOT have blocked TQQQ entries. The gate that blocked us was vix_proxy, not gap filter.
lessons.confidence_accuracy: Cannot measure — no scores computed due to vix_gate blocking before scoring.
lessons.diversification: N/A — no trades. With 0 entries, zero diversification data collected.
lessons.mean_reversion: RSI data unavailable (gate fired before RSI checked). On a +9.59% TQQQ day, mean_reversion should target SQQQ (RSI likely >72 intraday at some points).
lessons.afternoon_trend: N/A — vix_gated before afternoon_trend_v1 window. 15/50 EMA likely bullish alignment given strong trend day.

vix_gate_analysis.gate_correct: UNCERTAIN — protected against potential high-vol reversal risk, but missed +9.59% up day. High realized vol can accompany both large up AND large down moves.
vix_gate_analysis.observation: 2 of 3 trading days with v3.5 gate active resulted in no-trade days (both 2026-06-10 and 2026-06-11). On 2026-06-10, VIX gate was justified (gap -2.75%, TQQQ -5.77% intraday). On 2026-06-11, gate may have been overly conservative (+9.59% missed).
vix_gate_analysis.consideration: The gate was designed for protection, not opportunity. Accept this day as correct gate behavior until 10 sessions of validation data are available.

adaptive_rules_triggered.vix_gate_active_tomorrow: TBD — compute vix_proxy at R1 using fresh 10-day TQQQ daily returns

priority_fixes: BUG: scalp_champion_v2 and scalp_challenger_v2 appear to be missing 1230/1400 windows in signal_engine.py — R5 flagged this; verify and fix before next session

VIX proxy gate: 2/3 trading sessions blocked entirely. This is working as designed but accumulating 0 trades/day delays the 30-trade live-trading threshold. Monitor and reconsider if 5+ consecutive no-trade days occur.
No scoring data collected today — cannot tune thresholds. All models need real entries to generate near-miss data from signal_attempts.jsonl.

root_causes: signal_engine.py FUSE-truncated (18,906B) since 06-11 evening — R1/R3/R4 correctly ran safe-mode no-trade (engine authoritative, never hand-score)
R5 (12:30 ET) and R6 (2:00 ET) never executed — no start records in runs.jsonl despite engine being restored (22,316B) before those windows; scheduled-task gap, full afternoon coverage lost
Outage cost was real: TQQQ +2.22% bullish day, ORB breakout + VWAP + bull EMA stack flagged entry-favorable at 10:15 and 11:00

priority_fixes: Verify R5/R6 scheduled tasks exist and are enabled — they silently did not run today even after engine restore
BD-02 durability (safe-write + integrity checks) — 3rd FUSE truncation incident class; engine outage cost a full favorable session
Phase 1 session count: engine-scored sessions only (2/10) — today contributes zero gated signals; all models remain 0/30

observations: First real scoring session (v2 models). All 6 models entered. 8 total trades across day.
TQQQ opened with +6.95% gap (bullish); SQQQ blocked per gap filter. All entries were TQQQ-long.
RP/1024 pulse: champion_v2 and challenger_v2 entered at 83.5301. Neither hit target (85.2007) nor stop (82.277). Force-sold at 84.4447 (+1.09%).
R3 scalp entries (83.435): scalp_champion_v2 and scalp_challenger_v2 hit profit_target at 84.2722 before R5. Net +3.35 and +1.67 respectively.
R5/1230: scalp_champion_v2, scalp_challenger_v2, afternoon_trend_v1 re-entered at 84.7853 (near intraday high). Force-sold at 84.4447 = small losses (-1.61, -1.00, -1.21).
R6/1400: mean_reversion_v1 entered floor at 84.6444. Force-sold at 84.4447 (-0.47). Entry above force-sell bar close = immediate negative.
VIX proxy 28.9 (shadow mode, <30). Gate flagged gate_would_block=False so entries allowed. Shadow-mode evidence: 1 session of data.
Bar-replay confirmed all 6 positions: neither target nor stop hit between entry and 15:50. force_sell correct.
key_lessons: R5/R6 entries on strong gap-up days risk entering near intraday highs. All 3 R5 entries and the R6 floor entry were above EOD force-sell price.
R3 scalp entries benefited from early morning momentum hitting target before afternoon reversal. Scalp models outperformed on this market structure.
RP/1024 entries at 83.53 captured moderate gains (+1.09%) via force-sell despite not reaching target. Trend models profitable on gap-up day.
VIX proxy 28.9 (below 30 threshold) allowed all entries. Shadow mode functioning correctly. No veto triggered.
N=1 for all v2 models. Signals-toward-30: champion/challenger=1/30, scalp models=2/30, afternoon_trend/mean_reversion=1/30. Statistical gates far from active.

lesson: SKILL-pm-triage.md was reading #trading-bot-ideas and processing ideas into roadmap.json but had no step to react or reply on the original idea messages. The consolidated summary was posted to #trading-bot-notifications only — Jashyard saw no acknowledgment on his original posts. Fix: added Step 6.5 (Close the Loop) requiring a slack_add_reaction + threaded reply on every idea message processed, using emoji to convey outcome (white_check_mark=added, recycle=exists, no_entry_sign=deferred, eyes=needs research). Root cause pattern: consume-and-summarize-elsewhere is not visible to the poster. Always close the loop at the source.
action_taken: Added Step 6.5 to pm-agent/SKILL-pm-triage.md. Retroactively applied reactions and replies to 5 unacknowledged ideas from 2026-06-15 (RM-091 through RM-094 confirmed, Massive Market Data marked eyes for next triage).

market_conditions.note: Big move was pre-market gap (+6.95%). Intraday open-to-high range only ~1.6% compressed.

bot_behavior.vix_gate_note: VIX proxy 28.9 below 30 gate. Entries allowed in shadow mode.

lessons.early_window_wins: R3 scalp entries at 83.435 (RSI=73.7, conf=41/60) hit profit_target at 84.2722 (+$3.35, +$1.67). RP intraday pulse at 10:24 (conf=80, RSI=89.1) entered 83.53 and force-sold profitably at 84.44 (+$5.47, +$3.28). All 4 early entries (R3+RP) profitable. On gap-up days morning momentum is the tradeable edge. Enter early or not at all.
lessons.afternoon_entry_failure: All 4 afternoon entries (R5 at 84.785, R6 floor at 84.64) were force-sell losses (-$4.29 total). R5 entry price 84.785 was above EOD close 84.4447 -- a force-sell loss was locked in at the moment of entry. scalp_champion_v2 scored 100/100 at R5 but entry was near intraday high. Score does not penalize for intraday high proximity -- scoring gap identified.
lessons.gap_day_pattern_established: Gap-up day (+6.95%) structure: big move pre-market, intraday range compressed (~1.6% open-to-high). Pattern to carry forward -- on GAP_UP > +5%, R5/R6 entries require RSI below 55 (not 61), EMA_factor > 0 mandatory for afternoon_trend_v1, mean_reversion floor entries suppressed when gap > +3% and direction already long.
lessons.agent_action_items: 3 decisions for R8/boardroom: (1) Gap-day afternoon filter -- when gap_pct > 5% and price within 0.5% of session_high, skip R5/R6 or reduce size 50%. (2) mean_reversion_v1 direction check -- gap > +3% should suppress long floor entry or bias to SQQQ. (3) afternoon_trend_v1 EMA gate -- require EMA_factor > 0 before entry; zero EMA score means no trend. All N=1 observations. Do not change params until R8 validates across more sessions.

what_went_well: Net profitable (+$9.48). First scored session all 6 v2 models. Gap filter blocked SQQQ correctly on +6.95% gap. VIX shadow mode functioned (28.9 < 30 gate). All 4 early entries profitable.
what_went_wrong: All 4 afternoon entries were force-sell losses. R5 entry above EOD close -- structurally guaranteed loss from entry. afternoon_trend_v1 entered with EMA=0 ORB=0 (no confirmation). mean_reversion_v1 floor entry on +9.28% day RSI=48.3 (not an extreme -- no signal support).

benchmark_comparison.note: No benchmark data for 2026-06-15 -- benchmark fix deployed EOD. Benchmarks start 2026-06-16.

market_conditions.note: FOMC week. Near-flat gap (-0.485%). TQQQ rose intraday to ~84.79 at RP/1027, then reversed sharply. Closed -5.38% from prev. SQQQ +5.32%.

key_lessons: SQQQ long on bearish day: scalp models entered SQQQ at 36.9961 (R3/1015), force-sold at 38.3385 (+3.63%). Net +$21.48 scalp lane. Correct directional call.
Champion/challenger TQQQ longs stopped at 83.1201 (-1.96%) from 84.7854 entry (RP/1027). Stop-loss gating capped losses vs -$22.75 full EOD loss on same qty.
First benchmark comparison day. Active net +$8.16 vs benchmark avg -$24.62. Active models outperformed by ~+$32.78 on a down day.
FOMC week reversal pattern: near-flat gap, early intraday rise to ~84.79, then sharp reversal. RP/1027 entry at local high flagged as risk pattern.
sqqq_always_v1 stop_price (38.2317) was breached (close 38.35) but benchmarks are EOD-only. Correctly recorded as force_sell — benchmark circuit-break bypass working.
FOMC gate: 06-17 NO-ENTRY per PM triage. 06-19 market closed. Next live session: 06-20. R2 force-close runs on 06-17/06-18 but minimal/zero positions expected.
